name_en: Top-tier original replica exclusive real shot📷M46643. New vintage mini saddle. Unique shape and cute size, stylish micro-scented handle bag, single-canvas material. Inspired by the original Sty bag first launched in 1978, this exquisitely crafted and practical design features delicate details that highlight this unparalleled fashion item. It has a detachable and adjustable strap, serving as a shoulder bag or crossbody bag.
